Since 2015, we have reduced the weight of outbound packaging per shipment by 41% on average, that’s over 2 million tons of packaging material.If you still require Amazon packaging for this item, choose "Ship in Amazon packaging" at checkout. item_specifications.special_feature: Durable, Easy to Clean, Orthopedic, Water Resistant, Waterproof

about_item: Orthopedic Support - Our dog crate bed equips a 3-inch thick high-density egg crate foam, which helps evenly distribute our dog's weight, comfort our dogs with strong support to bones and joint, effectively relieves joint pain and arthritis, encourages deep and restful sleep, especially for puppies and older dogs.

Ultra-soft & Waterproof - The sleeping area of the waterproof dog bed is made of 3-layer fabric. The outer deluxe plush surface is soft and skin-friendly. The middle TPU waterproof layer prevents liquid from penetrating, so that the foam won't get wet. The inner knit fabric lining is durable enough for long time use.

Removable Cover & Durable Zipper - The outer cover of the pet bed is equipped with a premium L-shaped zipper, which is smooth and durable, makes it very easy to remove. The cover is machine washable for easy care. The upgraded fabric and reinforced stitches ensure the cover remains as good as new after multiple washes.

Two-sided Design - One side of the dog bed features ultra-soft deluxe plush velvet, provides a warm shelter for our pet to snug in the cold weather. While the other side is made of Oxford fabric, it helps keep our dog cool in summer. The Oxford fabric is also durable enough to hold up to daily wear and tear.

Size & Using Occasions - This orthopedic dog bed measures 35"L x 22"W x 3"H, for dogs up to 50lbs. It can be used as a dog crate pad, dog pillow, dog mattress, cage bed, crate bed at home, even as a dog travel bed in a car or truck. It arrives as a vacuum-packed bed in a box, so please let it inflate for about 24 hours before using.

certified_by.name: OEKO-TEX STANDARD 100
certified_by.description: OEKO-TEX® STANDARD 100 certified products require every component of a textiles production including all thread, buttons, and trims to be tested against a list of more than 1,000 regulated and unregulated chemicals which may be harmful to human health. The assessment process is globally standardised, independently conducted, and updated at least once per year based on new scientific information or regulatory requirements.

summary.text: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, comfortable, and easy to wash with its removable cover. The bed fits perfectly in dog crates and accommodates large frames, with one customer noting it's softer on joints. While some customers say it's durable and holds up well, others report it tearing apart within minutes of use. The size receives mixed feedback, with some finding it perfect for medium-sized dogs while others say it's not suitable for big puppies. Customers consider it good value for money.

insights.title: Quality
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed to be of good quality, particularly suitable for senior dogs, with one customer noting its orthopedic design.

examples.snippet: ...The softer side of the removable cover is nice and warm, but the reverse side, for warmer weather, is not very comfortable and my dog didn't care...
Great bed the dogs love these. Bought (2) and seems to hold up to their digging of the beds, and time will tell for how long.
Excellent product, well made and very nice. The cover has a zipper on two sides which makes it much easier to put the cover on the foam padding....
I purchased 1 at first to make sure they were good quality and they are! I purchased two more after this purchase. Fits perfectly in my dogs cages too

insights.title: Washability
insights.summary: Customers appreciate that the dog bed is easy to wash, with the outer cover being removable and machine washable.

examples.snippet: Came fast, Cute and easy to clean but to flat for me and my pittys taste. Didn't last long either. Dont think ill be recommending this bed to anyone....
...The cover is easy to wash and put back on. Cons: the edging got my dogs attention, but she’s a chewer and was throwing a tantrum.
Nice size and fits in the crate perfectly. The cover comes off and is washable. The inside is only a piece of foam so I'll see how it holds up.
...I love that the cover is washable and has a soft side for winter. Definitely worth it, especially if your pet needs an orthopedic bed.

insights.title: Comfort
insights.summary: Customers find the dog bed very comfortable, noting that their pets sleep cozily in it, with one customer mentioning that it prevents scratching and digging.

examples.snippet: Both my dog and my granddaughter find this bed to be comfortable. When my dog isn't on it you can find my 2 year old granddaughter on it. Love it.
...The quality is nice and soft and comfy so that the pets want to sit or lay on it long enough to snap a cute photo. The foam is excellent....
...He prefers sleeping on this mattress in his kennel over our bed! Very comfortable, easy to clean, and looks great.
Great product and fits perfectly in the crates. Cover is soft and cozy too! Great price for this product. Highly recommend.

examples.snippet: ...This perfect fit, not overly stuffed bed has been perfect, not able to bunch it up and all his pressure sores are gone!...
I have a small dog pen and this 17 inch by 23 inch fits perfectly 👌 I feel better about putting my dog in this pen at night....
Great price and quality. Fits the crate perfectly. The cover is very easy to remove for washing. No arm wrestling the cover to get it back on either....
Best dog bed I've ever bought. It fit the crate perfectly, and the egg foam insert is excellent quality.

examples.snippet: ...is thick and supportive, perfect for my dog’s joints, and the soft, plush material makes it so inviting. She curled up on it as soon as I unpacked it!
Dogs love them, they’re very soft and comfortable. The color is great but when they can stained they are hard to clean, we wash ours once a week

Great price and quality. Fits the crate perfectly. The cover is very easy to remove for washing. No arm wrestling the cover to get it back on either....
Nice bed and good price. No anti-slip on the pad. Disappointed that it slides and now need too add to the pad.
...Very comfortable, durable and is high quality. Great for the price.

insights.summary: Customers have mixed experiences with the dog bed's durability, with some finding it strong and lasting for years, while others report it tearing apart in less than a day.

examples.snippet: ...Easy to clean, was the perfect size, super soft, and so far has been durable and has held up to everyday use the padding is just the right amount!
Not durable at all. The dog ripped a hole and tore out the stuffing in less then an hour In his crate. Very disappointed and a waste of 30 dollars.
...The great points is it is sturdy, comfortable, even the cat has tried to steal it. The cover is easy to remove and it stands up to washing well.
Not durable. Dogs immediately ripped it apart. Tore open the zipper and destroyed the zipper. Would not recommend

Too small
Great size, quality, durability and comfort. Our smalls kids have laid/played on it almost as much as our dog!
Good size, and easy to clean/ puf back together. Product is thick for comfort. Fits in my dogs crate perfectly.

authors_reviews.title: Very happy with this!
authors_reviews.text: I bought this for our puppy’s kennel and it’s perfect! It fits perfectly and is very well made. The top is soft and the sides and bottom are made from a heavy duty fabric that has held up very well. I just washed it for the first time and it came out perfect, without any shrinking, and it was easy to put back on the thick egg crate mattress. I would definitely recommend this!
authors_reviews.author: Susan B.

authors_reviews.title: Perfect for My Senior Pup’s Crate
authors_reviews.text: I got this for my senior pug mix who spends a lot of time in his crate, and it’s been a really good fit. The foam has a nice balance — supportive without being too firm — so he can lie comfortably without sinking down. He settles on it easily and looks comfortable.The cover is simple to remove and wash, and it keeps its shape afterward. It also fits the crate well and doesn’t bunch up.If you need a reliable, supportive crate bed for an older dog, this is a solid option. I’m happy with the quality and feel.
authors_reviews.author: HB

authors_reviews.title: Great bed for bed killers!
authors_reviews.text: Excellent puddy bed especially for dogs who are bed killers. Removable foam insert so you can wash the cover. Size may be a bit small for large dogs. Bought 2 for our labs and they are on the large size for a lab and they barely fit on the bed but they make it work and the foam insert is thick enough to keep them comfy. They tend to nibble on their beds so for the price, it's ok if I have to replace them a few times a year. At least they're not tearing up a $60 bed like they've been known to do!
authors_reviews.author: SDT

authors_reviews.title: Best quality around. Not anti-slip
authors_reviews.text: I only deducted a star because although the bottom layer has tiny anti-slip dots, they are completely ineffective on hard floors, so I had to put a sheet of non-slip liner under the bed so that it doesn't slide when pup jumps on and off.The 23"x17" is perfect for small dogs and cats; it's ideal for any space in the home or in a kennel or vehicle floor. I got this as a "safe space" for my Yorkie, who is trained to go to a bed or marked spot for treats and general safety, etc.. I keep this gray one in my kitchen, it fits perfectly in a quiet corner, so pup can watch me cook but stay out of the way. I placed it on a tile floor, so I am very pleased with the thickness and firmness of the foam and the warmth of the top fuzzy layer to keep my pup elevated and warm, off the cold tile floor. My cat also thinks he can fit on the pad, but when they're together it's a bit of a squeeze, LOL, but they love to cuddle even if a couple paw need to hang off the edge.I also use this dog bed as a flooring pad for my pet's holiday photo shoots. The quality is nice and soft and comfy so that the pets want to sit or lay on it long enough to snap a cute photo.The foam is excellent. It arrived rolled up and compressed, but I opened it and let it air out and expand for about a day and a half, and since then it's been perfectly shaped.
authors_reviews.author: hawkeye

authors_reviews.title: Does the job.
authors_reviews.text: I don't know anything about foam but that's obviously where most of the value or what you're paying for. Its the perfect size for my desk and buddy. Hes a velcro companion, and sleeping on a desk mat just didn't sit right with me. This little bed (17L x 12W x 2(?)H) hits the sweet spot for cushion. The tough liner is pretty much sturdy canvas feel with the fuzzy top. Around $19 after (17.99/deal) tax which is honestly not a deal, I guess I would've paid a couple dollars more, like 20+ if it was at its original price $19 something but point is, the bed is good. Well packaged, and does what it was described.
authors_reviews.author: Jay Tan

authors_reviews.title: Great dog bed!
authors_reviews.text: This is a great bed for dogs. I have a husky who likes to "fluff" his bed before getting comfy, using his nails and/or teeth. So obviously durability is a big requirement and this bed has held up wonderfully since Christmas. Being able to take off the cover and wash it is so handy. This bed still looks brand new and it is used consistently everyday.
authors_reviews.author: Antonia Hansford

authors_reviews.title: Great Bed for My Standard Poodles
authors_reviews.text: I bought this KSIIA Orthopedic Dog Bed to test it out with one of my Standard Poodles, and it ended up being so good that I ordered a second one for my other poodle. Both of them settled right in, they stretch out on the beds with a blanket over top, and they seem perfectly comfortable. The thickness is great, supportive without being too firm, and I really appreciate that the cover zips off so I can wash it whenever it gets dirty. I usually put a fresh doggy blanket on top to keep the bed cleaner longer, and it’s been working perfectly. Overall, a solid, cozy bed that my poodles actually enjoy.
authors_reviews.author: Carolynn

authors_reviews.title: Very firm foam, my dog does not like it
authors_reviews.text: This bed is fine for the price, but my dog does not like it. The cover has a loud crinkly quality due to the waterproof material, and the foam is very firm with no sort of soft padding on top so the "egg crate" texture comes through and it's not very comfortable. The top fabric is super silky soft, but without a soft padding between the fabric and the foam, it's just not a great feeling. My dog prefers a more "pillowy" bed, as you can see in the photo.The size is perfect to fit inside a 36" crate and the cover is easy to remove for the wash.
authors_reviews.author: Kimberly

other_countries_reviews.title: Poor quality
other_countries_reviews.text: The foam of the bed is just a regular one. Not the orthopaedic design. So the product is not what is shown in the image. Very disappointing.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Excellent
other_countries_reviews.text: This actually exceeded my expectations. Excellent size, quality and thickness. I am ordering more for the rest of the doggos.
other_countries_reviews.author: Kristin Sustawenko

other_countries_reviews.title: Dog approved
other_countries_reviews.text: Memory foam for dogs! They love it the 65 lbs and the 20 lbs. Definitely the best bed they’ve had. Doesn’t lose its shape, easy to wash, and comfy.
other_countries_reviews.author: Victoria

other_countries_reviews.title: Love it!
other_countries_reviews.text: My dog loves it and I love it too for its sturdiness, absolute value for money and comfort. You must go for it.
other_countries_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

other_countries_reviews.title: Good ortho mattress for dogs
other_countries_reviews.text: The colour is different but quality is good.
other_countries_reviews.author: Sakshi
